title: Global Landmarks Tour
description: A showcase of world-famous landmarks using Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles.

chapters.title: Eiffel Tower
chapters.subtitle: Paris, France
chapters.description: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. Named after Gustave Eiffel, it stands as a global cultural icon of France.

chapters.title: Big Ben
chapters.subtitle: London, UK
chapters.description: Big Ben is the nickname for the Great Bell of the Great Clock of Westminster, known around the world for its accuracy and its massive bell.

chapters.title: Statue of Liberty
chapters.subtitle: New York, USA
chapters.description: The Statue of Liberty is a colossal neoclassical sculpture on Liberty Island in New York Harbor, a gift of friendship from the people of France to the United States.

chapters.title: Marina Bay Sands
chapters.subtitle: Singapore
chapters.description: Marina Bay Sands is an integrated resort fronting Marina Bay in Singapore. It is considered the world's most expensive standalone casino property and features an iconic rooftop Infinity Pool.
